description: API endpoint URL accessed repeatedly should stay core
facts: The authentication service runs on port 8080
Auth service endpoint: POST /api/v2/auth/token
The auth service is at localhost:8080
Login endpoint: /api/v2/auth/token with POST method
Auth tokens expire after 3600 seconds
The service uses JWT for token encoding
query: What is the authentication service endpoint?

description: Database connection info accessed many times stays core
facts: PostgreSQL database runs on db.internal:5432
Database name is hermes_prod
DB host: db.internal, port: 5432
Production database: postgresql://db.internal:5432/hermes_prod
Database requires SSL connection
Connection pool max size: 20
Read replicas are at db-replica.internal:5432
query: What is the production database host and port?

description: Team standup time rehearsed daily stays core after a month
facts: Daily standup is at 9:30 AM PST
Team standup meeting: every weekday 9:30 AM Pacific Time
Morning sync at 9:30 each weekday
Standup is in the main conference room (Zoom link in calendar)
Skip standup on company holidays
query: What time is the daily standup?

description: Deployment command accessed before every deploy stays core
facts: Deploy to production: ./scripts/deploy.sh --env prod
Deployment script location: scripts/deploy.sh
Always run tests before deploying: make test && ./scripts/deploy.sh --env prod
Staging deploy: ./scripts/deploy.sh --env staging
Rollback command: ./scripts/rollback.sh --version <tag>
Deploy requires VPN connection to be active
query: What is the production deployment command?

description: Critical API key format checked frequently stays core
facts: Stripe API keys start with sk_live_ in production
Test Stripe keys start with sk_test_
Stripe webhook secret is stored in STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var
Stripe API version in use: 2023-10-16
Stripe keys are rotated every 90 days
query: What prefix do Stripe production API keys use?

description: On-call rotation info referenced repeatedly stays core
facts: On-call rotation is weekly, starts Monday 9 AM
Current on-call engineer receives PagerDuty alerts
On-call schedule rotates among: Alice, Bob, Carol, Dave
Escalation path: on-call -> team lead -> CTO
On-call runbook: docs.internal/runbooks/on-call
query: How often does the on-call rotation change?

description: Redis cache TTL looked up constantly stays core
facts: Redis cache default TTL: 300 seconds
Cache TTL for user sessions: 86400 seconds (24 hours)
Redis runs on cache.internal:6379
Cache TTL default is 5 minutes (300s)
Hot cache entries (accessed >100x) get TTL extended to 3600s
Cache eviction policy: allkeys-lru
query: What is the Redis cache default TTL?

description: CI pipeline trigger conditions checked before every PR stays core
facts: CI runs on every pull request to main or develop
CI pipeline: lint -> unit tests -> integration tests -> deploy staging
Push to main triggers production deployment after CI passes
CI uses GitHub Actions defined in .github/workflows/
CI timeout is 20 minutes total
Failed CI blocks merge automatically
query: When does the CI pipeline run?

description: Sprint length consulted every sprint start stays core
facts: Sprints are two weeks long
Sprint starts on Monday, ends Friday of the second week
Two-week sprint cycle starting each odd Monday
Sprint review on last Friday of the sprint at 3 PM
Retrospective follows the sprint review on Fridays
Backlog refinement happens mid-sprint on Wednesdays
query: How long are the sprints?

description: Logging level env var looked up constantly stays core
facts: Set LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG to enable verbose logging
Default log level is INFO in production
LOG_LEVEL environment variable controls log verbosity
Debug logging: LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
Warning: DEBUG level logs can expose sensitive data
Log output goes to stdout and is captured by Datadog
query: How do you enable debug logging?
